hooks.command: filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$filepath" == */apps/api/* && "$filepath" == *.ts ]]; then cd /Users/aliaksandrnatashkin/WebstormProjects/jake/apps/api && npx eslint --fix "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; elif [[ "$filepath" == */apps/web/* && "$filepath" == *.ts* ]]; then cd /Users/aliaksandrnatashkin/WebstormProjects/jake/apps/web && npx eslint --fix "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.env($|\.)'; then echo 'BLOCK: .env files should not be edited by Claude. Edit manually.' && exit 2; fi
